productDisplayName: FILA Men Elite Black Casual Shoes
description: A perfect blend of style and comfort, the fila Elite shoe comes in a sleek design with a low profile silhouette, making this a great buy.UpperLeather upper with a stylised toe cap that has stitch detailing for absolute durabilityRound toe for an easy FitContrast coloured panels on the midfoot, with branding on the lateral side for added styleLacing system for a snug, customised fitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort, with a patent leather foxingOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs and grooves for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
